name: EDUCATIONAL DEVELOPMENT CORP
summary: Educational Development Corporation (EDC) is a Delaware-incorporated publisher and distributor of children's educational products. It owns and publishes Kane Miller children's books, Learning Wrap-Ups educational manipulatives, and SmartLab Toys STEAM-based toys and games. EDC is also the exclusive U.S. MLM distributor of Usborne Publishing Limited children's books. Products are sold through two divisions: PaperPie (direct sales via ~7,800 Brand Partners) and EDC Publishing (trade sales to ~4,000 retail outlets).

products.name: Kane Miller Children's Books
products.description: Owned and exclusively published children's books, many translated from other languages with U.S. and some North American rights.

products.name: Learning Wrap-Ups
products.description: Owned line of educational manipulatives sold domestically and internationally.

products.name: SmartLab Toys
products.description: Owned line of STEAM-based toys and games sold domestically and internationally, including foreign distribution rights.

products.name: Usborne Books
products.description: Children's books exclusively distributed in the U.S. via MLM channel under agreement with Usborne Publishing Limited.

partnerships.description: Exclusive U.S. MLM distribution agreement for Usborne children's books; retail distribution rights not included.
